'''dhapïfkïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pycnogonoid|pycnogonoid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-p-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pycnogonoid|pycnogonoid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| dhapïfkïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhæpïfkïfth || dhæpïfkïfj || dhæpïfkïfsh || dhæpïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhapïfpïfkïfth || dhapïfpïfkïfj || dhapïfpïfkïfsh || dhapïfpïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhapïfkïfth || dhapïfkïfj || dhapïfkïfsh || dhapïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhapïffkïffth || dhapïffkïffj || dhapïffkïffsh || dhapïffkïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dhapïfkïfïf || dhapïfkïfïf || dhapïfkïfïf || dhapïfkïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || dhapïfkïfth || dhapïfkïfj || dhapïfkïfsh || dhapïfkïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dhapïfkïfïfl || dhapïfkïfïfl || dhapïfkïfïfl || dhapïfkïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dhapïfkïfïfïf || dhapïfkïfïfïf || dhapïfkïfïfïf || dhapïfkïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || dhapïfkïfïfn || dhapïfkïfïfn || dhapïfkïfïfn || dhapïfkïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dhapïfkïfïforo || dhapïfkïfïforo || dhapïfkïfïforo || dhapïfkïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
